_raw.name: Anvil
_raw.weaponquote: Has high damage output and headshot damage, but slow handling.

_raw.name: Aphelion
_raw.weaponquote: Fires high velocity energy rounds.

_raw.name: Arpeggio
_raw.weaponquote: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

_raw.name: Bettina
_raw.weaponquote: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.

_raw.name: Bobcat
_raw.weaponquote: Has a high fire rate but low accuracy.

_raw.name: Burletta
_raw.weaponquote: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

_raw.name: Canto
_raw.weaponquote: Fully automatic submachine gun with a larger caliber

_raw.name: Dolabra
_raw.weaponquote: An experimental weapon that can either fire a wide short range blast, or be focused to fire a tight medium range beam of heat.

_raw.name: Equalizer
_raw.weaponquote: A high capacity experimental beam rifle.

_raw.name: Ferro
_raw.weaponquote: Packs a punch, but must be reloaded between every shot.

_raw.name: Hairpin
_raw.weaponquote: Has a built-in silencer. Great for stealth, but tricky in combat.

_raw.name: Hullcracker
_raw.weaponquote: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.

_raw.name: Il Toro
_raw.weaponquote: Has a large bullet spread, sharp falloff, and high damage output.

_raw.name: Jupiter
_raw.weaponquote: A bolt-action sniper rifle with exceptional damage output and accuracy, but slow handling.

_raw.name: Kettle
_raw.weaponquote: Quick and accurate, but has low bullet velocity and takes a long time reload.

_raw.name: Osprey
_raw.weaponquote: Has reliable damage output and accuracy.

_raw.name: Rattler
_raw.weaponquote: A cheap offensive option, but has to be reloaded 2 bullets at a time.

_raw.name: Renegade
_raw.weaponquote: Has high damage output, accuracy, and headshot damage.

_raw.name: Stitcher
_raw.weaponquote: Deals good damage, but has quite a low fire-rate and can be hard to control.

_raw.name: Tempest
_raw.weaponquote: Has moderate fire rate and accuracy.

_raw.name: Torrente
_raw.weaponquote: Has a large ammo capacity, but is only accurate while crouched.

_raw.name: Venator
_raw.weaponquote: Semi-automatic pistol. Fires two shots at a time.

_raw.name: Vulcano
_raw.weaponquote: Has good bullet spread but sharp falloff.

_raw.name: Heavy Shield
_raw.quote: A heavy shield that blocks a large portion of incoming damage, but carries a significant cost to mobility.

_raw.name: Light Shield
_raw.quote: A lightweight shield that blocks a small portion of incoming damage without impacting mobility.

_raw.name: Medium Shield
_raw.quote: A standard shield that blocks a medium portion of incoming damage at a moderate cost to mobility.

_raw.name: Combat Mk. 1
_raw.quote: Basic combat augment. Supports stronger shields, but with limited backpack capacity and Quick Use slots.

_raw.name: Combat Mk. 2
_raw.warning: Restores 1 health every 5 seconds. When damage is taken, the effect is paused for 30 seconds.
_raw.quote: A Combat augment more focused on maneuverability than absorbing damage.

_raw.name: Combat Mk. 3 (Aggressive)
_raw.warning: Restores 2 health every 5 seconds. When damage is taken, the effect is paused for 30 seconds.
_raw.quote: An improved version of the Combat II augment. Supports more shield types, and comes with extra space for grenades.

_raw.name: Combat Mk. 3 (Flanking)
_raw.warning: Stowed or unequipped Pistols and Hand Cannons are 33% faster to equip.
_raw.quote: A combat augment more focused on maneuverability than absorbing damage.

_raw.name: Free Loadout Augment
_raw.quote: Basic augment for rookie Raiders, offering slightly more backpack space and carry capacity.

_raw.name: Looting Mk. 1
_raw.quote: Basic looting augment. More backpack slots and weight capacity, but low defensive and tactical capability.

_raw.name: Looting Mk. 2
_raw.warning: Automatically throws off attached Ticks after 1s.
_raw.quote: Significantly increases looting potential; adds slots for trinkets.

_raw.name: Looting Mk. 3 (Cautious)
_raw.quote: A looting augment that swaps some carry capacity to increase survivability.
_raw.warning: Upon Shield break, automatically administers a weak Adrenaline Shot. Has a fixed cooldown.

_raw.name: Looting Mk. 3 (Safekeeper)
_raw.warning: A Safe Pocket that allows any items to be stored.
_raw.quote: A looting augment that trades weight and utility for increased looting potential.

_raw.name: Looting Mk. 3 (Survivor)
_raw.warning: While downed and stationary, health regenerates up to 75% of max downed health.
_raw.quote: A heavy-duty pack mule augment. Large weight capacity and large backpack space.

_raw.name: Tactical Mk. 1
_raw.quote: Basic tactical augment. More Quick Use slots for more tactical choice, but limited survivability and slightly lower looting potential.

_raw.name: Tactical Mk. 2
_raw.warning: Upon Shield break, deploys a small smoke grenade. Has a fixed cooldown.
_raw.quote: Adds more backpack space and an extra utility item slot.

_raw.name: Tactical Mk. 3 (Defensive)
_raw.warning: Allows Shield Rechargers to be used while running.
_raw.quote: A defensive-focused augment for keeping Shields topped up.

_raw.name: Tactical Mk. 3 (Healing)
_raw.warning: When revived from being downed, releases a healing cloud that instantly restores 20 health. Has a 30-second cooldown.
_raw.quote: A healing-focused augment which adds extra slots for healing items.

_raw.name: Tactical Mk. 3 (Revival)
_raw.quote: A tactical augment focused on utility over defense and looting.
_raw.warning: Restores 1 health every 5 seconds. When damage is taken, the effect is paused for 30 seconds.

_raw.name: Blaze Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that detonates on impact, covering an area in fire that deals damage over time.

_raw.name: Blue Light Stick
_raw.quote: A throwable chemical light that illuminates the area around it.

_raw.name: Firecracker
_raw.quote: A device that sparks and pops in a pleasant manner.

_raw.name: Gas Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that creates a lingering toxic cloud on impact, draining the stamina of any Raiders within its area of effect.

_raw.name: Green Light Stick
_raw.quote: A throwable chemical light that illuminates the area around it.

_raw.name: Heavy Fuze Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that detonates after a delay, dealing explosive damage in its radius.

_raw.name: Li'l Smoke Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that pops a thick but small smoke cloud on impact, blocking visibility from ARC and other Raiders.

_raw.name: Light Impact Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that detonates on impact, dealing explosive damage in a small radius.

_raw.name: Lure Grenade
_raw.quote: A noisy device that sticks to surfaces, distracting nearby ARC machines and drawing their fire.

_raw.name: Red Light Stick
_raw.quote: A throwable chemical light that illuminates the area around it.

_raw.name: Seeker Grenade
_raw.quote: A homing grenade that targets a single nearby ARC dealing explosive damage on impact.

_raw.name: Showstopper
_raw.quote: A grenade that detonates after a delay, stunning enemies within its radius.

_raw.name: Shrapnel Grenade
_raw.quote: A makeshift fuze grenade that bursts into razor-sharp fragments upon detonation.
_raw.warning: Weak against ARC armor plating

_raw.name: Smoke Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that creates a lingering smoke cloud on impact, blocking visibility from ARC and other Raiders.

_raw.name: Snap Blast Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that sticks to surfaces, dealing explosive damage after a short delay.

_raw.name: Tagging Grenade
_raw.quote: A grenade that detonates after a delay, tagging Raiders and ARC enemies in an area, allowing you to briefly track their location.

_raw.name: Trailblazer
_raw.quote: A grenade that emits a trail of flammable gas along its path, causing an explosive chain reaction when it ignites.

_raw.name: Trigger 'Nade
_raw.quote: A remote-detonated grenade that can stick to surfaces and ARC, dealing explosive damage when triggered.

_raw.name: Wolfpack
_raw.quote: A grenade that scatters into multiple homing missiles, each one targeting ARC and dealing explosive damage on impact.

_raw.name: Yellow Light Stick
_raw.quote: A throwable chemical light that illuminates the area around it.

_raw.name: Acoustic Guitar
_raw.quote: A playable acoustic guitar used to attract ARC's attention, and impress other Raiders.

_raw.name: Adrenaline Shot
_raw.quote: A serum that fully restores stamina and temporarily increases stamina regeneration.

_raw.name: Agave Juice
_raw.quote: A concoction that temporarily increases stamina regeneration, at a small initial cost to health.

_raw.name: Bandage
_raw.quote: A medical item that gradually restores health over time.

_raw.name: Barricade Kit
_raw.quote: A deployable cover that can block incoming damage until it breaks.

_raw.name: Binoculars
_raw.quote: A basic pair of binoculars with two levels of magnification.

_raw.name: Blaze Grenade Trap
_raw.quote: A laser trip wire that detonates a Blaze Grenade.

_raw.name: Deadline
_raw.quote: A mine that deals damage to anything within its radius once the timer runs out.

_raw.name: Defibrillator
_raw.quote: An injection that quickly revives downed Raiders and restores some health. <!--Always capitalize Raiders rule-->

_raw.name: Door Blocker
_raw.quote: A locking mechanism that can be placed on large metal doors to limit access.

_raw.name: Explosive Mine
_raw.quote: A proximity-triggered mine that pops up and explodes, dealing damage to anything within its radius.

_raw.name: Fireworks Box
_raw.quote: A remotely triggered arrangement of dazzling fireworks, sure to put on a show.

_raw.name: Flame Spray
_raw.quote: A classic makeshift weapon, sure to leave scorch marks.

_raw.name: Fruit Mix
_raw.quote: A food item that moderately increases both health and stamina.

_raw.name: Gas Grenade Trap
_raw.quote: A laser trip wire that detonates a Gas Grenade.

_raw.name: Gas Mine
_raw.quote: A proximity-triggered mine that pops up and deploys a gas cloud that rapidly drains stamina.

_raw.name: Herbal Bandage
_raw.quote: An improvised medical item that gradually restores health over time.

_raw.name: Integrated Binoculars
_raw.warning: Locked to equipped augment
_raw.quote: Can be equipped and used like regular binoculars, but cannot be dropped or removed from their slot.

_raw.name: Integrated Defibrillator
_raw.quote: Defibrillator Recharger on a fixed cooldown. Can be used like a normal Defibrillator, but cannot be dropped or removed from its slot.
_raw.warning:
Locked to equipped augment
Cooldown: 240s

_raw.name: Integrated Shield Recharger
_raw.quote: Reusable Shield Recharger on a fixed cooldown. Can be used like a normal Shield Recharger, but cannot be dropped or removed from its slot.
_raw.warning:
Locked to equipped augment
Cooldown: 120s

_raw.name: Jolt Mine
_raw.quote: A proximity-triggered mine that pops up and stuns anything within its radius.

_raw.name: Lure Grenade Trap
_raw.quote: A laser trip wire that detonates a Lure Grenade.

_raw.name: Noisemaker
_raw.quote: A deployable proximity sensor that sounds an alarm when enemy raiders are detected.

_raw.name: Photoelectric Cloak
_raw.quote: A gadget that allows the user to conceal themselves from ARC.

_raw.name: Pulse Mine
_raw.quote: A proximity-triggered mine that pops up and knocks back anything within its radius.

_raw.name: Recorder
_raw.quote: A playable recorder used to attract ARC's attention, and impress other Raiders.

_raw.name: Remote Raider Flare
_raw.quote: A deployable device that, when manually triggered, launches a Raider Distress Flare.

_raw.name: Shaker
_raw.quote: A rhythmic instrument used to attract ARC's attention, and impress other Raiders.

_raw.name: Shield Recharger
_raw.quote: A handheld kit that gradually recharges shield over time.

_raw.name: Smoke Grenade Trap
_raw.quote: A laser trip wire that detonates a Smoke Grenade.

_raw.name: Snap Hook
_raw.quote: A gadget that allows the user to scale structures and cover large distances.

_raw.name: Sterilized Bandage
_raw.quote: A medical item that gradually restores a large amount of health over time.

_raw.name: Surge Coil
_raw.quote: A deployable device that periodically electrifies the area around itself and briefly stuns anything caught within it.

_raw.name: Surge Shield Recharger
_raw.quote: A handheld kit that recharges a shield on use.

_raw.name: Vita Shot
_raw.quote: A medical item that restores a large amount of health.

_raw.name: Vita Spray
_raw.quote: A medical item that continuously restores health during use. Can be used on yourself or your allies.

_raw.name: Zipline
_raw.quote: A deployable zipline that allows you to quickly move between two locations.

_raw.name: Chemicals
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies, explosives, and utility items.

_raw.name: Fabric
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies and shields.
_raw.warning: Can be used to slowly restore small amounts of health.

_raw.name: Metal Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items.

_raw.name: Plastic Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items.

_raw.name: Rubber Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items.

_raw.name: Advanced Electrical Components
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Advanced Mechanical Components
_raw.quote: Used to craft advanced weapons. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Antiseptic
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies. Can be recycled into chemicals.

_raw.name: Crude Explosives
_raw.quote: Used to craft explosives. Can be recycled into crafting materials.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create a loud noise.

_raw.name: Durable Cloth
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies.

_raw.name: Electrical Components
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Explosive Compound
_raw.quote: Used to craft explosives.

_raw.name: Magnetic Accelerator
_raw.quote: Used to craft advanced weapons.

_raw.name: Mechanical Components
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Mod Components
_raw.quote: Used to craft weapons mods. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Power Rod
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Advanced ARC Powercell
_raw.quote: Very valuable resource that drops from certain ARC enemies.

_raw.name: ARC Alloy
_raw.quote: Obtained from ARC enemies or activities, or by recycling certain ARC parts. Used to craft components.

_raw.name: ARC Circuitry
_raw.quote: Obtained from ARC enemies or activities. Used to craft components. Can be recycled into ARC Alloy.

_raw.name: ARC Motion Core
_raw.quote: Obtained from ARC enemies or activities. Used to craft components. Can be recycled into ARC Alloy.

_raw.name: ARC Powercell
_raw.quote: Valuable resource that drops from all ARC enemies.
_raw.warning: Can be used to repair shields.

_raw.name: Battery
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into scrap metal.

_raw.name: Canister
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into plastic.

_raw.name: Complex Gun Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft advanced weapons.

_raw.name: Duct Tape
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials

_raw.name: Exodus Modules
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items.

_raw.name: Great Mullein
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies.

_raw.name: Heavy Gun Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft weapons.

_raw.name: Light Gun Parts
_raw.quote: Assorted spare parts used for pistols and SMGs.

_raw.name: Magnet
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Medium Gun Parts
_raw.quote: Assorted spare parts used for rifles.

_raw.name: Moss
_raw.quote: Can be used to regain a small amount of health.

_raw.name: Oil
_raw.quote: Used to craft weapons and explosives. Can be recycled into chemicals.

_raw.name: Processor
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Rope
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Sensors
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Simple Gun Parts
_raw.quote: Used to craft weapons.

_raw.name: Speaker Component
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Steel Spring
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Synthesized Fuel
_raw.quote: Used to craft utility items and explosives. Can be recycled into chemicals.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown, and will explode if shot.

_raw.name: Syringe
_raw.quote: Used to craft medical supplies. Can be recycled into plastic.

_raw.name: Voltage Converter
_raw.quote: Used in crafting.

_raw.name: Wires
_raw.quote: Used to craft a wide range of items. Can be recycled into crafting materials.

_raw.name: Angled Grip I
_raw.attachquote: Slightly reduces horizontal recoil.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Arpeggio, Il Toro, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest, Vulcano, Aphelion

_raw.name: Angled Grip II
_raw.attachquote: Moderately reduces horizontal recoil.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Arpeggio, Il Toro, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest, Vulcano, Aphelion

_raw.name: Angled Grip III
_raw.attachquote: Significantly reduces horizontal recoil
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Arpeggio, Il Toro, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest, Vulcano, Aphelion

_raw.name: Anvil Splitter
_raw.attachquote: Tech mod for the Anvil that replaces its bullets with ones that split into 4 weaker projectiles.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Anvil

_raw.name: Compensator I
_raw.attachquote: Slightly reduces per-shot dispersion.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Anvil, Arpeggio, Burletta, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest

_raw.name: Compensator II
_raw.attachquote: Moderately reduces per-shot dispersion.

_raw.name: Compensator III
_raw.attachquote: Significantly reduces per-shot dispersion.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Anvil, Arpeggio, Burletta, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest

_raw.name: Extended Barrel
_raw.attachquote: Moderately increases bullet velocity.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Anvil, Arpeggio, Burletta, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest

_raw.name: Extended Light Mag I
_raw.attachquote: Slightly extends the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use light ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Hairpin, Kettle, Stitcher, Burletta, Bobcat

_raw.name: Extended Light Mag II
_raw.attachquote: Moderately extends the ammo capacity of the compatible weapons that use light ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Hairpin, Kettle, Stitcher, Burletta, Bobcat

_raw.name: Extended Light Mag III
_raw.attachquote: Significantly extends the ammo capacity of the compatible weapons that use light ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Hairpin, Kettle, Stitcher, Burletta, Bobcat

_raw.name: Extended Medium Mag I
_raw.attachquote: Slightly extends the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use medium ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Arpeggio, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Venator, Tempest

_raw.name: Extended Medium Mag II
_raw.attachquote: Moderately extends the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use medium ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Arpeggio, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Tempest, Venator

_raw.name: Extended Medium Mag III
_raw.attachquote: Significantly extends the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use medium ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Arpeggio, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Tempest, Venator

_raw.name: Extended Shotgun Mag I
_raw.attachquote: Slightly extends the ammo capacity of shotguns.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Il Toro, Vulcano

_raw.name: Extended Shotgun Mag II
_raw.attachquote: Moderately extends the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use shotgun ammo.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Il Toro, Vulcano

_raw.name: Extended Shotgun Mag III
_raw.attachquote: Significantly extends the ammo capacity of shotguns.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Il Toro, Vulcano

_raw.attachquote: Moderately reduces both vertical recoil and horizontal recoil.
_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Arpeggio, Il Toro, Venator, Bettina, Bobcat, Tempest, Vulcano, Aphelion

_raw.compatible_weapons: Ferro, Kettle, Rattler, Stitcher, Arpeggio, Il Toro, Osprey, Renegade, Torrente, Hullcracker, Bettina, Bobcat, Vulcano, Aphelion,

_raw.name: Energy Clip
_raw.quote: Ammo used for energy weapons. One clip will fully charge a single weapon.

_raw.name: Launcher Ammo
_raw.quote: Anti-ARC payloads used mainly by the Hullcracker.

_raw.name: Ancient Fort Security Code
_raw.quote: Temporary security code to unlock the main gate.
_raw.warning: Can only be used during Locked Gate

_raw.name: Blue Gate Cellar Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks certain cellar doors near the Blue Gate

_raw.name: Blue Gate Communication Tower Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks a door by the Communication Tower near the Blue Gate

_raw.name: Blue Gate Confiscation Room Key
_raw.quote: Unlock a door to the confiscated foods area with the Blue Gate tunnels.

_raw.name: Blue Gate Village Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks a door to one of the old village buildings near the Blue Gate.

_raw.name: Buried City Hospital Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks a door in the Hospital in Buried City

items.wiki_title: Buried City JKV Employee Access Card
items.name: Buried City JKV Employee Access Card

_raw.name: Buried City JKV Employee Access Card
_raw.quote: Unlocks a door in the J Kozma Ventures company building in Buried City

_raw.name: Buried City Residential Master Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks certain apartment doors in Buried City

_raw.name: Buried City Town Hall Key
_raw.quote: Unlocks a door to the Town Hall in Buried City

_raw.name: Celeste's Journal
_raw.quote: Battered and torn, you can see the faint outline of doodles along the edges.

_raw.name: Dodger's Note
_raw.quote: A hurriedly scribbled note, all crumpled up.

_raw.name: Dusty Film Reel
_raw.quote: A dusty recording of a solemn corporate announcement.

_raw.name: Espresso Machine Parts
_raw.quote: Replacement parts salvaged from an espresso machine.

_raw.name: ESR Analyzer
_raw.quote: A specialized medical device Lance needs recovered from a Buried City pharmacy.

_raw.name: Experimental Seed Sample
_raw.quote: A cryogenically frozen research sample of an experimental crop.

_raw.name: First Wave Compass
_raw.quote: Dusty but functional, these helped chart a course when all seemed lost.

_raw.name: First Wave Rations
_raw.quote: Often heated above discreet fires, these meager provisions are said to have fueled a resistance.

_raw.name: First Wave Tape
_raw.quote: An old tape found inside a battered old camcorder.

_raw.name: Flushing Terminal Key
_raw.quote: A pungent key used to operate the Flushing Terminals in the tunnels below Spaceport.

_raw.name: LiDAR Scanner
_raw.quote: A laser-based scanner used to detect the subtlest changes to the Earth's surface.

_raw.name: Major Aiva's Mementos
_raw.quote: A closely-shut box, covered in many years worth of dust.

_raw.name: Major Aiva's Patch
_raw.quote: A torn patch, found amidst rubble and ruin.

_raw.name: Moisture Meter
_raw.quote: Measures soil moisture levels for precise irrigation control.

_raw.name: Nutrient Meter
_raw.quote: Ideal for monitoring soil and water nutrient levels in greenhouses or fields.

_raw.name: Official Shutdown Documentation
_raw.quote: Top-secret protocols outlining the shutdown of Project Heartwood.

_raw.name: Old World Books
_raw.quote: The past survives in fragments, often dull or ordinary, yet priceless to the right person.

_raw.name: Possibly Toxic Plant
_raw.quote: A speculated source of miraculous healing, and/or particularly nasty rashes.

_raw.name: Project Heartwood Blueprints
_raw.quote: A mix of complex-looking blueprints and reports, labeled Project Heartwood

_raw.name: Raider Flag
_raw.quote: Sun-bleached and wrinkled, yet dignified all the same.

_raw.name: Scout Patrol Note
_raw.quote: A note seemingly documenting patrol schedules and access codes.

_raw.name: Secret Meeting Info
_raw.quote: Thorough documentation of secret meetings held by researchers around the Stella Montis facility.

_raw.name: Seed Vault Box Key
_raw.quote: A key opening a specific box in Stella Montis' Seed Vault

_raw.name: Stack Of Movie Tapes
_raw.quote: A stack of movie tapes, sure to please even the most pedantic of cinephiles.

_raw.name: Air Freshener
_raw.quote: May be worth a few coins.

_raw.name: Alien Duck
_raw.quote: A long, long way from home.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Bloated Tuna Can
_raw.quote: Something tells you that you don't want to open this...

_raw.name: Breathtaking Snow Globe
_raw.quote: The envy of every Speranzan. Proof that this world was once thriving and magical.

_raw.name: Burnt-Out Candles
_raw.quote: After the grid fell candles became the preferred source of light for many.

_raw.name: Cat Bed
_raw.quote: At least a tiny bit more comfortable than your face.

_raw.name: Coffee Pot
_raw.quote: The power to face a new day, one drip at a time.

_raw.name: Dart Board
_raw.quote: Some Raiders use it to practice dexterity. Others just like throwing things at other things.

_raw.name: Doodly Duck
_raw.quote: Everything is a canvas to a creative child.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Empty Wine Bottle
_raw.quote: Yes, it really is empty.

_raw.name: Expired Pasta
_raw.quote: Way pasta its prime.

_raw.name: Faded Photograph
_raw.quote: A snapshot of the world before, faded by sunlight and time.

_raw.name: Familiar Duck
_raw.quote: Unlike the real one, this one fits in your pack.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Film Reel
_raw.quote: May be worth a few coins.

_raw.name: Fine Wristwatch
_raw.quote: Perfect for telling the time, and showcasing that you're an exceedingly dignified person.

_raw.name: Flashy Duck
_raw.quote: Lovingly hand-painted by someone of great talent—clearly. Any guesses who?
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Gentle Duck
_raw.quote: Udderly adorable.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Lance's Mixtape (5th Edition)
_raw.quote: Lance has personally planted a number of these around the Rust Belt, for some reason.

_raw.name: Light Bulb
_raw.quote: Without light, life underground would be impossible.

_raw.name: Music Album
_raw.quote: Perfect for relaxing nights at home, casual get-togethers, and provide air guitar concerts.

_raw.name: Music Box
_raw.quote: Worth a small fortune.

_raw.name: Painted Box
_raw.quote: May be worth a few coins.

_raw.name: Playing Cards
_raw.quote: Speranzans love to see who can build the tallest tower - before the temors knock them down.

_raw.name: Poster Of Natural Wonders
_raw.quote: If you stand close and squint your eyes, it's like the world never came crumbling down.

_raw.name: Pottery
_raw.quote: May be worth a few coins.

_raw.name: Red Coral Jewelry
_raw.quote: Valued for its fine craftsmanship, and effortless ability to make your eyes pop.

_raw.name: Rosary
_raw.quote: May be worth a few coins.

_raw.name: Rubber Duck
_raw.quote: Always there to lend an ear, should you need it.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Silver Teaspoon Set
_raw.quote: A shining shimmering set of refinement and elegance.

_raw.name: Statuette
_raw.quote: Worth a small fortune.

_raw.name: Torn Book
_raw.quote: What pages remain speak of chosen heroes, vampires, and lots of longing glances.

_raw.name: Tropical Duck
_raw.quote: It quietly dreams of taking to the skies with its brethren.
_raw.warning: Can be thrown to create noise.

_raw.name: Vase
_raw.quote: Worth a small fortune.

_raw.name: Very Comfortable Pillow
_raw.quote: The envy of every Raider. Like sleeping on an especially ergonomic cloud.

_raw.name: Assorted Seeds
_raw.quote: A handful of seeds. Celeste might be looking for these.
